executives.name: Sherif Marakby
executives.background: Mr. Marakby has served as a director since 2021. He is an advisor to various mobility companies and previously served as President and CEO of Ford Autonomous Vehicles LLC and Vice President of Autonomous Vehicles and Mobility at Ford.
